text: Unemployment rates in Jan. 2026 ranged from 2.2% in SD and HI to 5.4% in CA and DE and 6.7% in DC.
Q4 2025 house price growth over the year ranged from -2.7% in FL to 6.4% in ND.
Q4 2025 state GDP growth over the year ranged from -0.1% in MD to 3.3% in MA.
Among states, Jan. 2026 average weekly earnings ranged from MS’s $987 to WA’s $1,524.
Retail and trade employment in Jan. 2026 fell year-over-year in 37 states and DC.
Only two states saw Q4 2025 government GDP growth over the year: 0.9% in MI and 1.0% in TX.
GA’s annual house price change in Q4 2025 was negative for the first time since Q1 2012.
Q4 2025 retail and trade GDP growth over the year ranged from –7.5% in WA and 1.6% in AZ.
In Jan. 2026, state and local public jobs rose year-over-year in 32 states.
